message:
fix: whitespace-only string bypass in sanitize_path_segment across 8 connectors

`is_empty()` allowed whitespace-only strings like "  " to pass path
validation, creating malformed URLs. Changed to `trim().is_empty()`.

Also added percent-encoding traversal checks (%2f/%5c) to Mastodon
sanitizer which was missing them.

Affected: mastodon, line, feishu, hackernews, coda, calendly,
circleci, confluence.

All 1,528 tests pass across 22 connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
